title: Bank Card Mod
description: A sleek and functional banking system for Minecraft 1.20.1 that allows players to digitize their currency and manage it via physical cards and terminals.
body:
# **🏦 Bank Card Mod**
This is a sleek and functional banking system for Minecraft 1.20.1 that allows players to digitize their currency and manage it via physical cards and terminals.

**Core Features:**
- 🏧 : A custom-modeled block (created in Blockbench) that serves as your interface for banking operations.

- **💳 Bank Cards:** Physical items that store your balance directly in their NBT data. This means your money is "on the card"—you can trade it, lose it, or store it in a safe.

- **⚙️ Universal Currency:** Fully configurable via a **.toml file**. By default, it uses Diamonds, but it can be easily changed to Create Deco Gold Coins or any other item from any mod.

- **💻 Command Integration:** Simple and intuitive commands (/bank deposit and /bank withdraw) to manage your funds while holding your card.

- **💾 Persistent Data:** Balances are saved to the item itself, making them safe through server restarts and technical maintenance.

### Technical Specs:
> Version: Forge 1.20.1 (more versions will be available soon)
> 
> Type: Universal (Requires installation on both Server and Client)
> 
> Config Location: config/bankcard-common.toml
